title: Additional information to be furnished along with the Cost Audit Reports.
description: Additional information to be furnished along with the Cost Audit Reports.
text: No. 52/826/81-CAB Government of India Ministry of Law, Justice and Company Affairs Cost Audit Branch, 801, Kanchenjunga, 18, Barakhamba Road, New Delhi-110 001 February 15, 1982 To The Secretary, I.C.W.A., Calcutta Subject: Additional information to be furnished along with the Cost Audit Reports. Sir, It has been decided that in future the cost auditors, while submitting the cost audit report will furnish information regarding the date on which cost accounting records were made available to them for audit and the date on which cost audit was completed. This information may be incorporated by the cost auditor in the forwarding letter. This requirement may please be brought to the notice of practicing cost accountants through your journal “Management Accountant”. Yours faithfully, (V. Gopalakrishnan) Senior Cost Accounts Officer -- 1 of 1 --
